evidence: "This is the worst of all the 'Paranormal' type of movies."
"The plot is a bit more of a just-write-the-story-as-we-go-along type."
"The suspense and climax is thin in this movie."
"It is a slow-burning story, but the ending makes it well worth the watch."
"A nice and slow build up to nowhere."
"The character development is pretty much shallow if not predictable."
"The creep factor is not really strong."
"The gore and/or blood factor was not overused."
"I was expecting a lot more out of this movie."

summary: The user shows a preference for slow-paced dramas and thrillers, often expressing disappointment in narrative complexity and emotional engagement. They tend to focus more on the story than on production quality, indicating a mixed overall taste in movies.
